news.title: Today is the last day to apply to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
news.summary: Submit your session topic before today ends for a chance to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Apply now to share your insight and help shape the conversations defining the tech industry.

news.title: Final 24 hours to save up to $410 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket
news.summary: You now have until tonight at 11:59 p.m. PT to lock in Early Bird savings of up to $410 for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 before prices increase. Join 10,000+ tech leaders in October for one of the most anticipated tech events of the year. Register now.

news.title: Show HN: AISlop, a CLI for catching AI generated code smells
news.summary: Hi, I’m Kenny, I’ve been building aislop. I starting working on this after using Claude Code, codex and opencode several times and noticing some slops. They aren’t syntax and passes most tests, they are patterns like empty catch blocks, useless comments, duplicated helpers, dead code and many more.
